---
title: "Methods & Concepts"
---

The conceptual layer above the models — how to ask the right causal question, how to design a study, how to think about confounding and identification before reaching for an estimator.

## Entries

- [*What If*, Ch. 1 — A definition of causal effect](what-if-ch1-causal-questions.qmd)

*Planned: target trial emulation, propensity scores (matching vs. weighting vs. stratification), IV methods, regression discontinuity, sensitivity analysis (E-values), study designs in RWE.*
